name: unifi-protect
description: Manage UniFi Protect — cameras, motion events, smart detections, recordings, snapshots, viewers, and NVR status.

UNIFI_HOST.description: Hostname or IP of your UniFi Protect NVR or console (e.g. https://192.168.1.1 or https://unifi.local)

UNIFI_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates. Set to false for self-signed certs (typical in homelabs)
